name: Deploy to Azure

on:
  worklow_dispatch: 
  push:
    branches:
      - main

env: 
 AZURE_WEBAPP_NAME: MedPoint
 AZURE_WEBAPP_PACKAGE_PATH: "./MedPoint/publish"
 DOTNET_VERSION: "8.x"
 SOLUTION_PATH: "MedPoint.Api.sln"
 API_PROJECT_PATH: "MedPoint.Api"
 PUBLISH_DIR: "./publish"

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Setup .NET
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4 
        with:
          dotnet-version: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore
        run: dotnet restore ${{ env.SOLUTION_PATH }}

      - name: Build
        run:  dotnet build ${{ env.SOLUTION_PATH }} --configuration Release --no-retore

      - name: Test
        run: dotnet test ${{ env.SOLUTION_PATH }} --configuration Release --no-retore --no-build --verbosity normal

      -name: publish
        run: dotnet publish ${{ env.API_PROJECT_PATH }} --configuration Release --no-retore --no-build --property:PublishDir = ${{ env.PUBLISH_DIR }}

      -name: Publish Artifacts
       uses: action/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
         name: webapp
         path: ${{ env.AZURE_WEBAPP_PACKAGE_PATH }}

deploy:
  name: Deploy to Azure
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  needs: [build-and-test]

  steps:
    - name: Download artifact from build job
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: webapp
        path: ${{ env.AZURE_WEBAPP_PACKAGE_PATH }}

    - name: Deploy
      uses: azure/webapps-deploy@v2
      with:
        app-name: ${{ env.AZURE_WEBAPP_NAME }}
        publish-profile: ${{ secrets.AZURE_WEBAPP_PUBLISH_PROFILE }}
        package: "${{ env.AZURE_WEBAPP_PACKAGE_PATH }}"
